name: fast-send-monorepo
description: Simple LAN file and text sharing tool
author: FastSend Team

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@fast-send/client && (if exist packages\server-go\dist (rmdir /s /q packages\server-go\dist)) && xcopy /e /i /y packages\client\dist packages\server-go\dist
scripts.build:cli: npm run build && cd packages/server-go && go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../../out/fast-send-cli.exe main.go
scripts.build:exe: npm run build && cd packages/server-go && go build -ldflags="-s -w -H windowsgui" -o ../../out/FastSend.exe main.go
